review.notes: The OCR contains two articles sharing the page — one about Mike Modano's performance against the Jets, and the main Sockeyes-relevant article "Door open for rookie to shine" by Brian Smiley. The draft correctly targets the latter. Matt Hervey (ex-1987 Richmond Sockeyes) is named as one of three rookie defencemen competing for a Jets roster spot following Brad Berry's shoulder separation. All key facts in the draft — names (Richison, Cronin, Hervey), Berry's injury, pre-season opponents (Pittsburgh, Los Angeles), and player characterisations — are confirmed by the OCR. Headline and byline are also accurate.
